weekly_summary: Over the past 7 days, our security landscape has been characterized by 25 total findings, with 15 unique CVEs tracked across various domains, including Cloud and IAM, Containers and K8s, Crypto Libraries, OS and Kernel, and Web and Servers. The most frequently seen CVEs, each occurring once, include CVE-2026-7031, CVE-2026-7034, CVE-2026-7037, CVE-2026-6980, CVE-2026-6981, CVE-2026-6982, CVE-2026-39987, CVE-2026-6885, CVE-2026-3259, and CVE-2026-33825. Notably, the most active day was April 25, 2026, indicating a recent surge in security incidents that warrant continued monitoring and mitigation efforts.
